Serial Murder Case
I wonder if Anna has already returned?
I arrived in Little Italy.

I wouldn't know if Anna Skakki was among the people walking around there.
The food store is bustling with tourists and locals. If you're thinking of making Italian food, you should come here to shop.
It feels like I came here just to buy BAM.
it does.
Maybe I should visit Anna's house first?
I bought BAM here, right?
It’s a stand that handles various magazines globally. Among them, there are some BAMS I’d rather not read.
No, I don’t have anything else to buy.
I have a bad feeling I'll discover something I don't want to see.
More importantly, I need to visit Anna’s house.
This place has that damn magazine, doesn't it?
Various types of magazines and newspapers are organized and lined up.
BAM, huh?
Huh?
There’s another article about Guy. I have an uneasy feeling about this.
I came here to see Anna. I came to buy a book.
That's not it.
If I buy BAM, I can read at least two interesting articles, right?
U, uh.
Mmm.
This time, the cover says.
Guy and Cindy are getting married soon?!
It’s written in big letters.
Seeing this, Eva Courtney's hateful face comes to mind. What does she intend to achieve by writing such an article?
Why do I have to pay for a magazine like this?
Guy has announced that he’s broken off his engagement. It seems he’s decided to marry Cindy.
When did he announce the breakup?
He even claims that his romance with his ex-fiancée was an illusion, and he wants to nurture true love with 16-year-old Cindy for life.
Guy spoke passionately about it.
His face was flushed with a bashful pink that didn't suit him.
Guy has pink cheeks?
This is unbelievably ridiculous.
I, Eva Courtney, was assaulted by Guy’s ex-fiancée who barged into the editorial department, but I wouldn’t back down.
When did Kristy ever resort to violence? This is an outrageous fabricated article.
I hope this article doesn't reach Kristy's eyes.
I, Eva Courtney,
what's this, is that woman behind this article too?
In three cities: San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Detroit,
the gruesome
is something I intend to pursue without letting up to catch the perpetrator.
Are you the police?
Right?
Sad to say, such incidents are frequent in the United States. Many events have probably faded from memory after several months.
However, this despicable criminal is still somewhere in America,
living on, with parts of the bodies of the girls.
Certainly, they are dismembering bodies, but what evidence is there to claim they are carrying them around?
I am convinced these three incidents are the work of the same perpetrator. And I believe the perpetrator, currently lying low, will murder again soon.
I am certain that such gruesome slaughter, the work of a demon incarnate, will happen again somewhere in the United States.
Indeed, judging by the body parts, it can be expected that it’s not over yet,
but this article is like provoking the criminal.
I can't even tell if Anna Skakki is mixed in among the people walking around.
There aren’t many passersby, and the slightly deserted feel is sad, yet people's expressions are bright and cheerful.
This time, it seems Anna's neighbor is not showing up.
Let's visit Anna's house first.
There doesn’t seem to be anyone to talk to.
More importantly, let's head to Anna's house first.
If it’s just a prank, I’m sorry.
Hey, haven’t I seen you recently?
Oh, right, you were the husband looking for a girlfriend. Did you find one?
At this rate, you're still not there, huh.
But still, you remembered well.
It's kind of part of the job to remember the faces of customers.
Is that really true?
Lately, do you have any interesting stories?
It's weird to say interesting, but what I'm most curious about right now is the series.
Yeah.
Are you talking about that incident that happened in Los Angeles and San Francisco?
That incident?
Detroit's missing from this, man.
I'm pretty knowledgeable about this topic.
Man.
Buy something will ya?
Man.
Buy something will ya?
Uh.
Yeah.
By the way, BAM has an article about Guy again this week. You gotta buy it, man!
It's not like I'm particularly interested in Guy's article.
Thinking you can just hear a lot from me and leave for free is pretty sweet, huh? Contribute a bit to my earnings.
Got it. Then I’ll take one BAM.
Thanks as always.
Man.
Don’t hold back, buy more.
Wasn’t the very first one in San Francisco? It was a 10-year-old girl who was the victim, right? Her stomach was missing.
Stomach was missing?
Yeah. The whole area was pretty much taken.
What was left at the scene was the upper body up to the stomach and two legs.
Th-that's horrifying.
Just imagining it makes me feel sick.
Right? The world is crazy.
The second one was a Japanese exchange student murdered in Long Beach, Los.
Why did the criminal target the girl's body?
Who knows, if I figured that out, I'd be a top-notch criminal psychologist. But, they say it was cut cleanly from the joints.
Cut from the joints?
Apparently, you can disassemble a human body without any strength if you know how.
And in the end, there's a girl in Detroit with no right arm. It seems it was also cleanly cut off from the shoulder.
I can't believe you researched all that.
What are you talking about? You can figure it all out just by reading what's lined up here.
Is that so?
Is that so?
Man.
There are theories that say all three cases are from the same perpetrator, and others that suggest they're not, but either way, it's a scary incident.
This week's BAM has related articles.
I wonder if Anna is around.
Meryl's search for her daughter will depend on the information regarding Anna Skakki.
There's a chance her story will end before we even get to test our deductive skills.
That's a possibility.
Still, why did Meryl want to find her daughter now?
I wonder if Anna is around.
Anna is still out.
When will she come back?
If I can't meet her like this, what will happen with Meryl's request? I'm starting to get a bit worried.
Honestly, if I can't meet her like this,
this article feels like a personal attack on Kristy Darn. Why make such a harsh article about an ordinary person?
I need to have a serious talk with Eva.
This topic also came up at the party, and the theory that Jennifer might be the perpetrator was suggested.
That came up, right?
First,
let's hear their story.
Is it about cutting up the body of a 10-year-old girl?
What does the perpetrator intend to do such a thing?
Next is the legs, huh?
What could cutting someone's body mean? Or is it an act without meaning?
So far, there have been three victims.
Lower abdomen, right leg, right arm.
What is the perpetrator thinking?
Maybe this series of incidents isn't over yet.
The BAM article might provoke the perpetrator. What is Eva thinking while writing this?
Wouldn't it be better to wait a while?
Aren't they still not back?
Anna's house, which I visited once already. I hope she's there this time.
With that hope, I rang the doorbell.
But unfortunately, there was no answer, and it seems she is not home.
Peeking into the mailbox, it was stuffed full of mail.
I looked into the mailbox before ringing the bell, and as always, it was stuffed with mail.
Guess I need to come back another time.
Sighing to myself, I returned to the street.
Anna hasn't returned yet. I wonder when I'll be able to meet her.
